judge_scores.reasoning: States three times and lists all correct years (2002, 2006, 2022) with accurate details.
The response correctly states that Lula was elected three times and lists the years (2002, 2006, 2022), matching the ground truth.
O modelo acertou o número de vitórias eleitorais de Lula (três vezes) e listou corretamente os anos de 2002, 2006 e 2022, com detalhes precisos sobre cada eleição.
